name: Rubble Trouble Tokyo
author: Poki
description: The Boss, Barry and the rest of the Rubble Trouble crew are back in Rubble Trouble: Tokyo! In this puzzle destruction game made by Nitrome, you as join the crew as they they destroy buildings around Tokyo. Every level, the building to destroy will be different but you'll also have different tools at your disposal. Occasionally, a construction worker will stand within the buildings - so be careful to not explode them! Can you help the crew destroy every building? How to play Rubble Trouble: Tokyo? Use the mouse to destroy different parts of the buildings! Who created Rubble Trouble: Tokyo? Rubble Trouble: Tokyo is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play Rubble Trouble: Tokyo for free? You can play Rubble Trouble: Tokyo for free on Poki. Can I play Rubble Trouble: Tokyo on mobile devices and desktop? Rubble Trouble: Tokyo can be played on your computer only.
